ml_top_positive_drivers.interpretation: Clean promoter background — low character risk
No material litigation — low legal risk
Strong sector conditions — favourable for lending

decision_rationale: Infosys Limited presents an exceptional credit profile, earning an AA rating with a Blended Risk Score of 88.94/100. The company demonstrates outstanding Capacity, reflected by an approximate DSCR of 88.8x and robust operating cash flow of ₹4351 crores, backed by strong financial performance and raised FY25 revenue guidance. Its excellent Character score of 95, substantial Capital (current ratio 2.27x, total assets ₹17419 crores), and highly favorable market Conditions in the IT sector further strengthen this recommendation. These factors collectively indicate a very low-risk borrower with ample ability to comfortably service the proposed debt. Therefore, the loan application is approved.
